requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility — Household Refrigerating Appliances (JS / CISPR 14 series under JSMO; TRC for any radio module)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——家用制冷器具（JSMO框架下JS / CISPR 14系列；含无线模块须TRC）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——家用製冷器具（JSMO框架下JS / CISPR 14系列；含無線模組須TRC）

summary.en: Electromagnetic compatibility for household appliances in Jordan is addressed through Jordanian Standards (JS) adopted from the IEC/CISPR family — principally CISPR 14-1 (emission) and CISPR 14-2 (immunity) for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus. These standards form part of the technical documentation supporting the JSMO conformity certificate for regulated electrical products. Unlike the EU, Jordan does not operate a separate stand-alone EMC directive with a dedicated CE-style self-declaration; EMC evidence is folded into the JSMO conformity assessment alongside electrical safety. Separately, if a refrigerator includes a wireless module (Wi-Fi or Bluetooth for smart-home connectivity), the radio aspect falls under the Telecommunications Regulatory Commission (TRC) of Jordan, which administers type approval / equipment authorization for radio-frequency equipment. The TRC requirement is independent of the JSMO appliance conformity certificate.
summary.zh: 约旦家用器具的电磁兼容通过采纳自IEC/CISPR族的约旦标准（JS）处理——主要为适用于家用器具、电动工具及类似器具的CISPR 14-1（发射）和CISPR 14-2（抗扰度）。这些标准构成支撑受管制电器产品JSMO符合性证书的技术文件的一部分。与欧盟不同，约旦不设独立的单独EMC指令及专门的类CE自我声明；电磁兼容证据与电气安全一并纳入JSMO合格评定。另外，若电冰箱含无线模块（用于智能家居连接的Wi-Fi或蓝牙），其无线部分由约旦电信监管委员会（TRC）管辖，TRC负责射频设备的型号核准/设备授权。TRC要求独立于JSMO器具符合性证书。
summary.zht: 約旦家用器具的電磁相容通過採納自IEC/CISPR族的約旦標準（JS）處理——主要為適用於家用器具、電動工具及類似器具的CISPR 14-1（發射）和CISPR 14-2（抗擾度）。這些標準構成支撐受管制電器產品JSMO符合性證書的技術文件的一部分。與歐盟不同，約旦不設獨立的單獨EMC指令及專門的類CE自我聲明；電磁相容證據與電氣安全一併納入JSMO合格評定。另外，若電冰箱含無線模組（用於智慧家居連接的Wi-Fi或藍牙），其無線部分由約旦電信監管委員會（TRC）管轄，TRC負責射頻設備的型號核准/設備授權。TRC要求獨立於JSMO器具符合性證書。

standards_or_laws: JS / CISPR 14-1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (Jordanian Standard adopted from CISPR 14-1)
JS / CISPR 14-2 — Part 2: Immunity (Jordanian Standard adopted from CISPR 14-2)
JSMO conformity certificate route — EMC evidence forms part of the technical documentation for regulated electrical products
Telecommunications Regulatory Commission (TRC) — type approval / equipment authorization required for any wireless (Wi-Fi/Bluetooth) module

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances (including refrigerators) are governed by GB 4343.1-2018 (emission limits and measurement methods; mandatory, equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016) and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (immunity; recommended, equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015), with GB 17625.1-2022 (mandatory, IDT IEC 61000-3-2) for harmonic emissions. These are enforced under the CCC regime administered by SAMR/CNCA. For wireless modules, China requires SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval. Chinese GB 4343.1 test reports and SRRC approvals are domestic-scope and are not directly accepted by JSMO or TRC, though the shared CISPR 14 basis means the underlying emission/immunity engineering largely aligns.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具（含电冰箱）的电磁兼容由GB 4343.1-2018（发射限值和测量方法；强制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（抗扰度；推荐性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）管理，谐波发射适用GB 17625.1-2022（强制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2）。上述标准在SAMR/CNCA管理的CCC制度下执行。无线模块方面，中国要求SRRC（国家无线电管理）型号核准。中国GB 4343.1检测报告及SRRC核准属国内范围，不被JSMO或TRC直接接受，但因共享CISPR 14基础，底层发射/抗扰度工程大体一致。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具（含電冰箱）的電磁相容由GB 4343.1-2018（發射限值和測量方法；強制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（抗擾度；推薦性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）管理，諧波發射適用GB 17625.1-2022（強制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2）。上述標準在SAMR/CNCA管理的CCC制度下執行。無線模組方面，中國要求SRRC（國家無線電管理）型號核准。中國GB 4343.1檢測報告及SRRC核准屬國內範圍，不被JSMO或TRC直接接受，但因共享CISPR 14基礎，底層發射/抗擾度工程大體一致。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)
GB 17625.1-2022 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (mandatory; IDT IEC 61000-3-2)
SRRC type approval — for any wireless (Wi-Fi/Bluetooth) module

gap.en: Two procedural gaps despite the shared CISPR 14 technical basis: (1) Conformity route — EMC evidence for Jordan is submitted as part of the JSMO conformity certificate dossier, not as a stand-alone CE-style self-declaration; Chinese GB 4343.1 CCC test data must be presented through a JSMO-recognised conformity assessment route. An IECEE CB / accredited CISPR 14 test report typically reduces duplicate testing — confirm acceptance with the importer and JSMO. (2) Wireless models — any refrigerator with Wi-Fi or Bluetooth requires separate TRC type approval in Jordan; the Chinese SRRC approval does not transfer. Note that Jordan does not impose an EU-style stand-alone EMC directive nor an EU-style RED regime; the EMC and radio obligations are handled through JSMO (appliance) and TRC (radio) respectively.
gap.zh: 尽管共享CISPR 14技术基础，仍存两项程序性差距：（1）符合性路径——约旦的电磁兼容证据作为JSMO符合性证书档案的一部分提交，而非独立的类CE自我声明；中国GB 4343.1 CCC检测数据须通过JSMO认可的合格评定路径提交。基于IECEE CB/认可机构的CISPR 14检测报告通常可缩减重复检测——须与进口商及JSMO确认接受度。（2）无线型号——任何含Wi-Fi或蓝牙的电冰箱在约旦须另行取得TRC型号核准；中国SRRC核准不可转移。注意约旦既不实行类似欧盟的独立EMC指令，也不实行类似欧盟的RED制度；电磁兼容与无线义务分别通过JSMO（器具）与TRC（无线）处理。
gap.zht: 儘管共享CISPR 14技術基礎，仍存兩項程序性差距：（1）符合性路徑——約旦的電磁相容證據作為JSMO符合性證書檔案的一部分提交，而非獨立的類CE自我聲明；中國GB 4343.1 CCC檢測數據須通過JSMO認可的合格評定路徑提交。基於IECEE CB/認可機構的CISPR 14檢測報告通常可縮減重複檢測——須與進口商及JSMO確認接受度。（2）無線型號——任何含Wi-Fi或藍牙的電冰箱在約旦須另行取得TRC型號核准；中國SRRC核准不可轉移。注意約旦既不實行類似歐盟的獨立EMC指令，也不實行類似歐盟的RED制度；電磁相容與無線義務分別通過JSMO（器具）與TRC（無線）處理。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC evidence (JS / CISPR 14 basis) forms part of the JSMO conformity certificate dossier; TRC type approval mandatory for any wireless module
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 4343.1-2018 (emission) under CCC; GB/T 4343.2-2020 (immunity) recommended; SRRC approval for wireless modules; administered by SAMR/CNCA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC for refrigerators entering Jordan is handled through JS standards adopting CISPR 14, submitted within the JSMO conformity certificate dossier rather than a stand-alone EU-style EMC self-declaration. Chinese GB 4343.1 CCC data is not directly accepted but a CISPR 14 / IECEE CB report reduces re-testing. Wireless-enabled models additionally require TRC type approval; Chinese SRRC approval does not transfer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入约旦的电冰箱电磁兼容通过采纳CISPR 14的JS标准处理，作为JSMO符合性证书档案的一部分提交，而非独立的类欧盟EMC自我声明。中国GB 4343.1 CCC数据不被直接接受，但CISPR 14/IECEE CB报告可缩减重新检测。含无线功能的型号另须取得TRC型号核准；中国SRRC核准不可转移。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入約旦的電冰箱電磁相容通過採納CISPR 14的JS標準處理，作為JSMO符合性證書檔案的一部分提交，而非獨立的類歐盟EMC自我聲明。中國GB 4343.1 CCC數據不被直接接受，但CISPR 14/IECEE CB報告可縮減重新檢測。含無線功能的型號另須取得TRC型號核准；中國SRRC核准不可轉移。
